name: The Fintech Emerald
symbol: Abstract geometric ledger with ascending bars forming a forward growth arrow
prompt: A premium iOS app icon, flat vector design, minimalist. The central symbol is an abstract geometric ledger made of clean ascending bars that perfectly form a dynamic forward-pointing growth arrow. The symbol uses vibrant mint green (#10B981) and soft pastel green (#A7F3D0). The background is a rich emerald green (#054A29) app icon squircle. World-class Dribbble Pentagram style, ultra-crisp edges, purely 2D flat modern graphic design, expensive fintech aesthetic. Absolutely no 3D, no drop shadows, no text, no letters, no photorealism.
